settings.profile.title: Profile
settings.profile.description: Your personal information and display settings.
settings.profile.leaveWorkspaceDescripti: You will lose access to all shared data in this workspace.
settings.profile.leaveWorkspaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? You will lose access to all shared data.
settings.profile.deleteWorkspaceDescript: Permanently delete this workspace and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.profile.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: This will permanently delete {{name}} and all associated data including connections, transactions, investments, and member data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.profile.deleteAccountDescriptio: Permanently delete your account and all personal data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.profile.deleteAccountConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data including portfolios, transactions, investments, and encryption keys. This action cannot be undone.
settings.security.title: Security & access
settings.security.description: Manage your sessions and security settings.
settings.encryption.title: Encryption
settings.encryption.description: Manage zero-knowledge encryption for your financial data.
settings.encryption.zeroKnowledgeDescrip: Encrypt your financial data so that only workspace members can read it. No one else can access your balances, IBANs, or investment details — not even us.
settings.encryption.noResetWarning: If you forget your passphrase, your encrypted data cannot be recovered. There is no reset mechanism. Store your passphrase safely.
settings.encryption.statusSetup: Encryption is enabled. Set up your passphrase to access encrypted data.
settings.encryption.statusPendingAccess: Your passphrase is set up. Waiting for a workspace member to grant you access.
settings.encryption.statusUnlocked: Your vault is unlocked. Data is being decrypted in your browser.
settings.encryption.statusLocked: Your vault is locked. Enter your passphrase to view data.
settings.encryption.statusAlwaysEnabled: Encryption is always enabled for all workspaces.
settings.encryption.keyRotationDescripti: Generate a new workspace keypair and re-encrypt all data. Other members will need to be re-granted access.
settings.encryption.rotateKeysDescriptio: Generate a new workspace keypair and re-encrypt all data. All other workspace members will lose access and need to be re-granted.
settings.encryption.rotateKeysWarning: All workspace members except you will lose access after rotation. You will need to re-grant access to each member.
settings.encryption.recordsToReencrypt_o: {{count}} encrypted record will be re-encrypted with the new key.
{{count}} encrypted records will be re-encrypted with the new key.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.description: Choose what updates you want to receive.
settings.notifications.updatesDescriptio: Subscribe to product announcements and important changes from the Bunkr team
settings.notifications.marketingDescript: Occasional emails to help you get the most out of Bunkr
settings.connections.title: Connections
settings.connections.description: All bank connections across your portfolios.
settings.connections.emptyDescription: Connections are managed per portfolio. Open a portfolio's settings to add a connection.
settings.connections.disconnectDescripti: This will remove the connection and all associated bank accounts. You can reconnect later.
settings.workspaceGeneral.title: General
settings.workspaceGeneral.description: Manage your workspace name and settings.
settings.workspaceGeneral.deleteWorkspac: Permanently delete this workspace and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete {{name}} and all associated data including connections, transactions, investments, and member data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.members.title: Members
settings.members.description: Invite and manage who has access to this workspace.
settings.members.bunkrAgentDescription: AI assistant with access to your financial data
settings.members.deactivateAgentDescript: This will revoke the agent's access to your financial data and delete all agent conversations. This action cannot be undone.
settings.members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this workspace? They will lose access to all shared data.
settings.members.grantAccessDescription: Your passphrase is needed to decrypt the workspace key before granting access to this member.
settings.members.inviteMembersDescriptio: Enter email addresses separated by commas to invite people to your workspace.
settings.members.invalidEmailError: "{{email}}" is not a valid email address
settings.members.alreadyMemberError: "{{email}}" is already a member or has a pending invitation
settings.teamDashboard.title: Team
settings.teamDashboard.description: Control what each member can see in the team dashboard.
settings.teamDashboard.teamPlanDescripti: Team permissions are available on the Team plan. Upgrade to manage what members can see in the team dashboard.
settings.teamDashboard.noMembersDescript: Invite members to your workspace to manage their team dashboard access.
settings.permissions.title: Permissions
settings.permissions.description: Control who can create workspace-level resources.
settings.permissions.categoryCreationDes: Who can create new categories assigned to the workspace
settings.permissions.labelCreationDescri: Who can create new labels assigned to the workspace
settings.permissions.automationRulesDesc: Who can create new transaction automation rules for the workspace
settings.categories.title: Categories
settings.categories.workspaceDescription: Define transaction categories shared across all portfolios.
settings.categories.portfolioDescription: Transaction categories available in this portfolio.
settings.categories.deleteCategoryDescri: This action cannot be undone. This category will be permanently deleted.
settings.categories.inheritedTooltip: Inherited from workspace — manage in workspace settings
settings.labels.title: Labels
settings.labels.workspaceDescription: Create labels to tag and organize transactions across portfolios.
settings.labels.portfolioDescription: Labels available for transactions in this portfolio.
settings.labels.addLabelWorkspaceDescrip: Create a label to tag transactions.
settings.labels.addLabelPortfolioDescrip: Create a label for this portfolio.
settings.labels.editLabelDescription: Update label name, description or color.
settings.labels.deleteLabelDescription: This action cannot be undone. This label will be removed from all transactions that use it.
settings.labels.inheritedTooltip: Inherited from workspace — manage in workspace settings
settings.rules.title: Automation Rules
settings.rules.workspaceDescription: Rules are processed top-to-bottom. The first matching rule assigns the category. Labels and budget exclusions are applied from all matching rules.
settings.rules.portfolioDescription: Portfolio rules are processed first, then workspace rules. The first matching rule assigns the category.
settings.rules.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Rules automatically categorize, label, and exclude transactions based on their description.
settings.rules.emptyPortfolioDescription: Create portfolio-specific rules or manage workspace rules in workspace settings.
settings.rules.deleteDescription: This automation rule will be permanently deleted. Transactions already processed by this rule will not be affected.
settings.agent.title: AI & Agents
settings.agent.description: Configure the Bunkr AI assistant for your workspace.
settings.agent.agentDescription: Allow conversations with Bunkr Agent inside your workspace
settings.agent.webSearchDescription: Allow Bunkr Agent to search the public web for current information and cite sources
settings.agent.retentionDescription: Automatically delete conversations older than this period
settings.agent.instructionsDescription: Provide custom instructions that guide how Bunkr Agent responds in your workspace.
settings.billing.title: Billing
settings.billing.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Subscription will cancel at the end of the current period.
settings.portfolioOverview.deletePortfol: Permanently delete this portfolio and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all associated data including connections, bank accounts, transactions, and investments. This action cannot be undone.

settings.portfolioConnections.title: Connections
settings.portfolioConnections.descriptio: Bank connections linked to this portfolio. You can set custom names for your accounts.
settings.portfolioConnections.emptyDescr: This portfolio has no connections yet.
onboarding.hero.title: Own Your Financial Data
onboarding.hero.description: Track your net worth, investments, and cash flow with zero-knowledge encryption. Your data stays private — not even we can access it.
onboarding.legal.title: Legal agreements
onboarding.legal.subtitle: Please review and accept the following to continue
onboarding.legal.tosLabel: I accept the Terms of Service
onboarding.legal.marketingLabel: I agree to receive marketing communications
onboarding.name.title: What's your name?
onboarding.name.subtitle: Let us know what to call you
onboarding.workspace.title: Create your workspace
onboarding.workspace.subtitle: Your workspace is where you manage your finances
onboarding.invite.title: Invite your team
onboarding.invite.subtitle: Share your workspace with others. You can always do this later.
onboarding.invite.emailPlaceholder: Enter email addresses, separated by commas
onboarding.vault.title: Set up your Vault
onboarding.vault.subtitle: Your financial data is protected with zero-knowledge encryption
onboarding.vault.alreadySetupSubtitle: Your encryption is already configured. Continue to the next step.
onboarding.vault.passphraseWarning: There is no reset mechanism. Store your passphrase safely.
onboarding.portfolio.title: Create your first portfolio
onboarding.portfolio.subtitle: Portfolios help you organize your financial accounts

onboarding.connection.subtitle: Link your bank accounts to start tracking your finances automatically
commands.paletteDescription: Search for pages or use AI to filter data
commands.aiExample: food expenses over 50€ from last month
dashboard.emptyDescription: You haven't connected any financial accounts yet. Get started by adding your first connection.
accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.emptyDescription: You haven't connected any financial accounts yet. Get started by adding a connection.
portfolios.title: Your portfolios
portfolios.description: Organize your accounts into separate portfolios for tracking.
portfolios.deleteConfirm: Deleting {{name}} is permanent and cannot be undone. Deleting a portfolio also deletes all associated accounts & connections.
views.description: Save and organize filtered views of your transactions.
views.emptyDescription: Create custom views using filters to show only the transactions you want to see. You can save, share, and favorite these views for easy access and faster collaboration.
views.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this view? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.createPortfolio.title: Create Portfolio
dialogs.createCategory.title: Create category
dialogs.createCategory.subtitle: This category will be available in {{scope}}.
dialogs.createCategory.visibilityTooltip: Choose whether this category is available in a single portfolio or shared across all portfolios in your workspace.
dialogs.createCategory.promoteMessage: {{name}} already exists in {{portfolio}}. Would you like to make it available across all portfolios?
dialogs.createLabel.title: Create label
dialogs.createLabel.subtitle: This label will be available in {{scope}}.
dialogs.createLabel.visibilityTooltip: Choose whether this label is available in a single portfolio or shared across all portfolios in your workspace.
dialogs.passphrase.title: Enter your passphrase
dialogs.passphrase.defaultDescription: Your passphrase is needed to decrypt the workspace key.
dialogs.passphrase.label: Passphrase
dialogs.passphrasePrompt.waitingDescript: Your passphrase is set up. A workspace member with access needs to grant you permission to decrypt data.
dialogs.passphrasePrompt.title: Unlock your vault
dialogs.passphrasePrompt.description: Enter your encryption passphrase to access your financial data.
dialogs.activateAgent.title: Activate Bunkr Agent
dialogs.activateAgent.description1: Bunkr Agent is an AI assistant that can analyze your financial data, answer questions about your spending, and provide insights about your portfolios.
dialogs.activateAgent.description2: To work, the agent needs server-side access to your encrypted financial data. When activated:
dialogs.activateAgent.point1: A secure keypair is generated and the agent is added as a workspace member
dialogs.activateAgent.point2: Our servers can decrypt your financial data for AI processing
dialogs.activateAgent.point3: Conversations with the agent are stored unencrypted on our servers
dialogs.activateAgent.point4: You can revoke access at any time — all agent data will be deleted
dialogs.deleteItems.description: This action cannot be undone. The selected items will be permanently deleted.

shortcuts.description: Available keyboard shortcuts in the app.

dialogs.addConnection.description: Securely connect your bank, broker, or insurance to start tracking your finances.
dialogs.addConnection.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.disclaimer: Conversations are stored unencrypted on our servers. Responses may contain mistakes and are for informational purposes only — not financial advice.

chat.suggestion.recentChanges: What did I change last week?

toast.ruleCreatedNewOnly: New transactions will be processed automatically.

toast.keyRotationComplete: Key rotation complete. Other members need to be re-granted access.

login.verificationCodeSent: We sent a verification code to {{email}}

waitlist.carousel.netWorthDescription: See your complete financial picture in one place. Track how your wealth evolves over time across all your accounts.
waitlist.carousel.encryptionDescription: Your data is encrypted end-to-end. Not even we can access it — only you hold the keys to your financial information.
waitlist.carousel.bankDescription: Connect all your bank accounts, brokerages, and crypto wallets. Everything syncs automatically via open banking.
waitlist.carousel.analyticsDescription: Understand your asset allocation, track investment performance, and spot opportunities to rebalance.
waitlist.carousel.cashFlowDescription: Categorize transactions automatically. See where your money goes and identify patterns in your spending.
transactions.noTransactionsDescription: No transactions found for this period. Try selecting a different date range.
recoveryCodes.title: Save your recovery codes
recoveryCodes.subtitle: These codes can be used to recover your vault if you lose your passphrase. Each code can only be used once.
recoveryCodes.warningOnlyShownOnce: These codes will only be shown once. If you lose them and your passphrase, your data cannot be recovered.
recoveryCodes.enterCodeDescription: Enter one of your recovery codes to recover access to your vault.
recoveryCodes.invalidCode: Invalid recovery code. Please try again.
recoveryCodes.codeAlreadyUsed: This recovery code has already been used.
recoveryCodes.setNewPassphraseDescriptio: Your vault has been recovered. Please set a new passphrase to secure your vault.
recoveryCodes.recoverySuccess: Vault recovered successfully with new passphrase
recoveryCodes.noCodesGenerated: No recovery codes have been generated yet.
recoveryCodes.generateDescription: Generate recovery codes to recover your vault if you lose your passphrase.
recoveryCodes.regenerateDescription: This will replace all existing recovery codes with new ones.
recoveryCodes.regenerateWarning: All existing recovery codes will be invalidated. Make sure to save the new codes in a safe place.

dialogs.manualTransaction.editDescriptio: Update the details of this manual transaction.
dialogs.deleteManualTransaction.title: Delete transaction
dialogs.deleteManualTransaction.descript: This manual transaction will be permanently removed from all analytics, budgets, and reports.
